questions.question: Ek Barista ka primary role kya hai?

options.B: Customers ko coffee beverages prepare aur serve karna
options.D: Kitchen ke saare utensils saaf karna

questions.explanation: Barista ka mukhya kaam customers ke liye coffee drinks banana aur serve karna hota hai.

questions.question: Ache coffee ka taste kis factor par sabse zyada depend karta hai?

options.B: Barista ki uniform

questions.explanation: Fresh coffee beans hi ache coffee taste ki buniyad hote hain.

questions.question: Coffee plant kis region mein naturally grow karta hai?

options.B: Tropical regions

questions.explanation: Coffee plant tropical regions mein, jaise ki 'Coffee Belt' mein, achi tarah ugta hai.

questions.question: Coffee beans ko grind karne ka main reason kya hai?

options.B: Unka aroma release karne aur brewing ke liye surface area badhane ke liye
options.C: Unka weight kam karne ke liye
options.D: Unhe lamba time tak store karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Grinding se coffee beans ka surface area badh jata hai, jisse brewing ke dauran flavour extraction behtar hota hai.

questions.question: Ek Barista ko customer service mein kya maintain karna chahiye?

options.B: Friendly and professional attitude

questions.explanation: Achhi customer service ke liye Barista ka friendly aur professional hona zaroori hai.

questions.question: Coffee cherries ke andar kitne seeds (beans) hote hain generally?

options.B: Do

questions.explanation: Aam taur par, ek coffee cherry mein do seeds hote hain, jinhe hum coffee beans kehte hain.

questions.question: Barista ke liye coffee-making mein consistency kyon important hai?

options.A: Taki har customer ko same high-quality beverage mile
options.B: Taki machine jaldi kharab na ho
options.C: Taki coffee beans kam kharch hon
options.D: Taki kaam jaldi khatam ho jaye

questions.explanation: Consistency se har customer ko standard aur high-quality coffee milti hai, jo customer satisfaction ke liye zaroori hai.

questions.question: Arabica aur Robusta, yeh kya hain?

options.B: Coffee shops ke naam

questions.explanation: Arabica aur Robusta coffee plants ki do sabse common species hain, jinke beans alag-alag characteristics rakhte hain.

questions.question: Coffee ke taste profile ko kya affect karta hai?

options.B: Origin, processing method, roast level, aur brewing method

questions.explanation: Coffee ka taste uske origin, processing, roasting aur brewing method jaise kai factors par depend karta hai.

questions.question: Ek Barista ko hygiene ka dhyan kyon rakhna chahiye?

options.B: Customers ki health aur safety ke liye

questions.explanation: Food safety aur customer health ke liye hygiene maintain karna bahut zaroori hai.

questions.question: Coffee ke 'body' se kya matlab hai?

options.B: Coffee ka weight

questions.explanation: Coffee ki 'body' uske mouthfeel aur texture ko refer karti hai, jaise ki light, medium, ya full-bodied.

questions.question: Espresso machine mein 'portafilter' ka kya role hai?

options.B: Ground coffee ko hold karna aur brew karna

questions.explanation: Portafilter ground coffee ko hold karta hai aur espresso machine mein lock hokar hot water ko coffee se pass karne deta hai.

questions.question: Green coffee beans kya hote hain?

options.A: Beans jo abhi roaste nahi hue hain
options.B: Coffee beans jo hare rang ke hote hain
options.D: Coffee beans jo kharab ho gaye hain

questions.explanation: Green coffee beans woh hote hain jinhe abhi roast nahi kiya gaya hai. Roasting ke baad hi unka colour brown hota hai.

questions.question: Coffee tasting mein 'acidity' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Coffee ka sour taste

questions.explanation: Coffee mein acidity ek desirable trait hai, jo usme brightness, crispness aur fruity notes add karti hai, jaise ki citrus ya berry.

questions.question: Ek Barista ko basic maintenance tasks kyon aane chahiye?

options.A: Taki woh machine ko repair kar sake
options.B: Taki woh choti-moti problems solve kar sake aur machine ki life badha sake
options.C: Taki woh machine ko dismantle kar sake
options.D: Taki woh machine ko upgrade kar sake

questions.explanation: Basic maintenance se machine ki efficiency bani rehti hai aur uski life badhti hai, aur choti-moti issues ko Barista khud handle kar sakta hai.

questions.question: Coffee ki quality par water quality ka kya asar hota hai?

options.B: Bahut kam asar hota hai
options.C: Bahut zyada asar hota hai, yeh taste ko directly affect karta hai
options.D: Sirf colour ko affect karta hai

questions.explanation: Water quality coffee ke taste aur aroma ko significantly affect karti hai, clean aur filtered water best hota hai.

questions.question: What is the primary function of a 'tamp' in espresso making?

options.A: Coffee ko scoop karne ke liye
options.B: Ground coffee ko portafilter mein evenly compress karne ke liye
options.C: Milk ko froth karne ke liye
options.D: Coffee beans ko grind karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Tamping se ground coffee evenly compress hoti hai, jisse water pressure uniformly distribute hota hai aur proper extraction hoti hai.

questions.question: Coffee beans ka kaunsa type high altitude par grow karta hai aur uska flavour profile complex hota hai?

options.B: Liberica

questions.explanation: Arabica beans high altitudes par ugte hain aur inka flavour complex, aromatic aur acidic hota hai.

questions.question: Coffee beans mein caffeine content generally kis variety mein zyada hota hai?

options.B: Robusta

questions.explanation: Robusta beans mein Arabica ke muqable double caffeine hota hai aur inka taste zyada strong aur bitter hota hai.

questions.question: Coffee beans ko 'wet process' se process karne ka kya fayda hai?

options.A: Yeh beans ko zyada bitter banata hai
options.B: Yeh beans ko cleaner aur brighter flavour deta hai
options.C: Yeh processing ka sabse sasta tareeka hai
options.D: Yeh beans ko jaldi dry karta hai

questions.explanation: Wet process (washed process) se beans ka fruity pulp hataya jata hai, jisse unhe cleaner, brighter aur more acidic flavour milta hai.

questions.question: Coffee roasting ka main purpose kya hai?

options.A: Beans ko lamba time tak store karna
options.B: Beans ka colour change karna
options.C: Beans mein flavour aur aroma develop karna

questions.explanation: Roasting se beans ke andar chemical reactions hote hain jo unke flavour aur aroma ko develop karte hain.

questions.question: 'First Crack' kya hai coffee roasting process mein?

options.B: Beans ka phatne ki pehli awaaz, jab moisture release hoti hai

questions.explanation: First crack woh stage hai jab beans ke andar ka moisture steam ban kar nikalta hai, jisse ek popping sound aati hai. Yeh roasting profile ka ek important indicator hai.

questions.question: Light roast coffee ka taste profile generally kaisa hota hai?

options.B: Mild, acidic aur fruity notes ke saath

questions.explanation: Light roasts mein beans ka original flavour profile zyada retain hota hai, often with bright acidity aur fruity notes.

questions.question: Dark roast coffee ka taste profile generally kaisa hota hai?

options.B: Mild aur nutty
options.C: Bold, smoky aur bitter, often with chocolatey notes

questions.explanation: Dark roasts mein beans ke natural oils surface par aa jate hain, jisse ek bold, smoky, aur kabhi-kabhi chocolatey ya bitter taste aata hai.

questions.question: Coffee beans ko store karne ka sabse best tareeka kya hai?

options.B: Freezer mein
options.C: Air-tight container mein, cool aur dark jagah par

questions.explanation: Coffee beans ko air-tight container mein, cool aur dark jagah par store karne se unki freshness aur flavour lamba time tak maintain rehti hai.

questions.question: 'Peaberry' coffee bean kya hai?

options.A: Ek bada size ka coffee bean
options.B: Ek single, gol coffee bean jo cherry mein akela develop hota hai
options.C: Ek coffee bean jo phat gaya ho

questions.explanation: Aam taur par, coffee cherry mein do flat-sided beans hote hain. Peaberry ek natural mutation hai jahan sirf ek gol bean develop hota hai.

questions.question: Coffee beans ko grind karne ke baad kitni der tak unka best flavour rehta hai?

options.B: Kai ghante tak

questions.explanation: Grinding ke baad coffee ka surface area badh jata hai, jisse woh bahut jaldi apna aroma aur flavour khone lagti hai. Isliye fresh grind karna best hai.

questions.question: Kon sa factor coffee bean ke flavour profile ko sabse zyada influence karta hai, origin ke baad?

options.B: Roast level

questions.explanation: Origin ke baad, roast level coffee ke flavour profile ko sabse zyada badalta hai, from light and fruity to dark and smoky.

questions.question: Kon sa processing method beans ko fruity aur full-bodied flavour deta hai, jisme cherry ka pulp dry hone tak laga rehta hai?

options.B: Dry Process (Natural)

questions.explanation: Dry process mein coffee cherries ko dhoop mein sukhaya jata hai jab tak ki woh puri tarah dry na ho jaye, jisse beans mein fruity aur full-bodied flavour aata hai.

questions.question: Coffee beans ko air-tight container mein store karna kyon zaroori hai?

options.A: Taki woh zyada garam na hon
options.B: Taki unmein moisture na aaye
options.C: Oxygen exposure kam karne aur freshness retain karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Oxygen coffee beans ko stale kar deta hai. Air-tight container oxygen exposure ko minimize karta hai.

questions.question: Grind size ka coffee extraction par kya asar hota hai?

options.A: Grind size ka koi asar nahi hota
options.B: Finer grind se faster extraction aur stronger taste, coarser grind se slower extraction aur milder taste
options.C: Finer grind se slower extraction, coarser grind se faster extraction
options.D: Sirf coffee ke colour ko affect karta hai

questions.explanation: Finer grind se water ka contact area badhta hai, jisse extraction faster aur stronger hoti hai. Coarser grind se extraction slower aur milder hoti hai.

questions.question: Kon sa roast level espresso ke liye sabse commonly use hota hai?

options.B: Medium roast

questions.explanation: Medium roast espresso ke liye popular hai kyunki yeh beans ke natural flavours ko retain karta hai jabki espresso ke liye required body aur sweetness bhi provide karta hai.

questions.question: Coffee beans ko freezing karne se kya hota hai?

options.B: Unka flavour long-term ke liye preserve hota hai, lekin condensation se bachna zaroori hai
options.C: Woh turant kharab ho jate hain
options.D: Woh grind karna mushkil ho jate hain

questions.explanation: Freezing coffee ki freshness ko preserve kar sakta hai, lekin condensation se bachne ke liye beans ko air-tight container mein freeze karna chahiye aur use karne se pehle room temperature par lana chahiye.

questions.question: Coffee ke flavour mein 'nutty' notes kis type ke beans mein commonly paye jate hain?

options.B: Medium roasted Arabica aur Robusta blends

questions.explanation: Nutty notes, jaise ki almond ya hazelnut, medium roasted Arabica beans aur Robusta blends mein commonly milte hain.

questions.question: Espresso machine mein 'group head' ka kya kaam hai?

options.B: Coffee beans grind karna
options.C: Portafilter ko lock karna aur garam pani ko coffee ke through pass karna

questions.explanation: Group head woh part hai jahan portafilter attach hota hai aur jahan se pressurized hot water ground coffee par release hota hai.

questions.question: Espresso machine ko regularly backflush karna kyon zaroori hai?

options.A: Taki machine zyada garam na ho
options.B: Taki machine ke andar ke coffee oils aur grounds saaf hon
options.C: Taki machine zyada electricity consume na kare

questions.explanation: Backflushing se group head aur internal parts se coffee oils, grounds aur residues remove hote hain, jo machine ki performance aur coffee ke taste ko affect kar sakte hain.

questions.question: Ek single espresso shot ke liye kitne grams ground coffee use karte hain generally?

options.B: 7-9 grams

questions.explanation: Ek single espresso shot ke liye 7-9 grams ground coffee use karna standard hai.

questions.question: Espresso extraction ke liye ideal temperature range kya hai?
questions.explanation: Ideal extraction temperature 90-96°C (195-205°F) hota hai, jo flavour compounds ko efficiently dissolve karta hai.

questions.question: 'Dosing' kya hai espresso making mein?

options.B: Grinder se portafilter mein ground coffee ki sahi quantity dalna

questions.explanation: Dosing ka matlab hai portafilter mein ground coffee ki accurate amount dalna, jo consistent shots ke liye zaroori hai.

questions.question: Espresso machine mein steam wand ka kya use hai?

options.B: Milk ko steam aur froth karna

questions.explanation: Steam wand hot steam produce karta hai, jiska use milk ko heat aur froth karne ke liye hota hai.

questions.question: Agar espresso shot bahut jaldi extract ho raha hai (under-extracted), toh kya adjust karna chahiye?

options.B: Grind ko aur fine karna

questions.explanation: Under-extraction tab hoti hai jab water bahut jaldi coffee se nikal jata hai. Grind ko fine karne se flow rate kam hota hai aur extraction time badhta hai.

questions.question: Agar espresso shot bahut dheere extract ho raha hai (over-extracted), toh kya adjust karna chahiye?

options.B: Grind ko aur fine karna

questions.explanation: Over-extraction tab hoti hai jab water bahut dheere coffee se nikalta hai. Grind ko coarse karne se flow rate badhta hai aur extraction time kam hota hai.

questions.question: Espresso machine ke water reservoir mein kon sa pani use karna chahiye?

options.B: Distilled water

questions.explanation: Filtered water use karna chahiye impurities aur minerals ko remove karne ke liye, jo machine ko damage kar sakte hain aur coffee ke taste ko affect kar sakte hain.

questions.question: 'Crema' kya hai espresso mein?

options.B: Espresso ke upar ek reddish-brown foamy layer

questions.explanation: Crema freshly pulled espresso shot ke top par ek reddish-brown foamy layer hoti hai, jo espresso ki quality aur freshness ka indicator hai.

questions.question: Steam wand ko har use ke baad wipe karna kyon zaroori hai?

options.B: Taki milk residue na jame aur hygiene maintain ho
options.D: Taki woh zyada steam produce kare

questions.explanation: Milk residue jamne se steam wand block ho sakti hai aur bacteria grow kar sakte hain, isliye hygiene ke liye ise turant saaf karna chahiye.

questions.question: Espresso machine ko 'descaling' kyon karte hain?

options.B: Taki machine se limescale deposits remove ho
options.C: Taki machine zyada pressure generate kare
options.D: Taki machine zyada coffee bana sake

questions.explanation: Descaling se machine ke internal parts mein जमा हुए limescale (mineral deposits) remove hote hain, jo water flow aur heating efficiency ko kam kar sakte hain.

questions.question: Espresso ke liye ideal extraction time range kya hai?

options.B: 20-30 seconds

questions.explanation: Ek standard double espresso shot ke liye ideal extraction time 20-30 seconds hota hai, jisme best flavour profile nikalta hai.

questions.question: Agar espresso shot ka taste bitter hai, toh kya problem ho sakti hai?

options.B: Over-extraction

questions.explanation: Bitter taste over-extraction ka sign hai, jahan coffee ke undesirable compounds bhi extract ho jate hain. Iske liye grind ko coarse karna ya extraction time kam karna pad sakta hai.

questions.question: Agar espresso shot ka taste sour ya weak hai, toh kya problem ho sakti hai?

options.B: Under-extraction

questions.explanation: Sour ya weak taste under-extraction ka sign hai, jahan sufficient compounds extract nahi ho pate. Iske liye grind ko fine karna ya extraction time badhana pad sakta hai.

questions.question: Espresso machine mein 'pressure gauge' kya indicate karta hai?

options.B: Boiler pressure ya pump pressure

questions.explanation: Pressure gauge machine ke boiler ya pump ka pressure dikhata hai, jo espresso extraction ke liye critical hota hai.

questions.question: Portafilter ko group head se remove karne ke baad clean kyon karna chahiye?

options.B: Taki coffee grounds aur oils accumulate na hon, jo next shot ke taste ko affect kar sakte hain

questions.explanation: Portafilter ko clean karne se old coffee grounds aur oils remove ho jate hain, jisse next shot ka taste fresh aur consistent rehta hai.

questions.question: Milk ko steam karte waqt, konsa sound indicate karta hai ki milk sahi tarah se aerate ho raha hai?

options.B: High-pitched screeching sound

questions.explanation: Ek gentle 'hissing' ya 'tearing paper' sound indicate karta hai ki steam wand milk ki surface ke theek neeche hai aur air incorporate ho rahi hai, jisse microfoam banta hai.

questions.question: Latte art ke liye konsa milk texture best hota hai?

options.B: Runny milk (liquid)

questions.explanation: Latte art ke liye glossy, velvety microfoam zaroori hai, jisme air bubbles bahut chote hote hain aur milk smooth flow karta hai.

questions.question: Milk ko steam karte waqt pitcher ko kis temperature tak garam karna chahiye?
questions.explanation: 60-70°C (140-160°F) ideal temperature hai. Isse zyada garam karne par milk ka natural sweetness khatam ho jata hai aur woh jalne lagta hai.

questions.question: Milk steaming ke baad pitcher ko counter par tap karna kyon zaroori hai?

options.B: Bade air bubbles ko eliminate karne aur microfoam ko smooth karne ke liye
options.C: Taki milk zyada garam ho jaye

questions.explanation: Tap karne se bade air bubbles surface par aa jate hain aur unhe swirl karne se microfoam evenly distribute ho jata hai.

questions.question: Latte art mein 'rosetta' design banane ke liye kya technique use karte hain?

options.B: Pitcher ko wave motion mein move karna
options.C: Milk ko directly center mein pour karna

questions.explanation: Rosetta ke liye milk ko espresso shot ke center mein pour karte hain aur phir pitcher ko side-to-side wave motion mein move karte hain.

questions.question: Kon sa milk type latte art ke liye sabse best mana jata hai?

options.B: Full-fat milk

questions.explanation: Full-fat milk mein fat content zyada hota hai, jo velvety texture aur stable microfoam banane mein help karta hai.

questions.question: Milk ko over-steam karne se kya hota hai?

options.A: Woh zyada meetha ho jata hai
options.B: Woh jal jata hai aur uska sweetness kam ho jata hai
options.D: Uska colour dark ho jata hai

questions.explanation: Over-steaming se milk jal jata hai, uski natural sweetness khatam ho jati hai aur woh thin, watery ho jata hai.

questions.question: Latte art mein 'heart' design banane ke liye kya technique use karte hain?

options.A: Milk ko ek dum se pour karna
options.B: Center mein ek circle banakar, phir upar se cut karna
options.C: Pitcher ko upar se wave karna
options.D: Milk ko cup ke edges par pour karna

questions.explanation: Heart design ke liye, milk ko center mein pour karke ek circle banate hain, phir pitcher ko thoda upar utha kar ek straight line se us circle ko 'cut' karte hain.

questions.question: Steam wand ko milk mein deep kyon rakhna chahiye aeration ke baad?

options.B: Taki milk ko 'roll' kiya ja sake aur microfoam evenly distribute ho

questions.explanation: Aeration ke baad steam wand ko milk mein deep rakhne se milk 'roll' hota hai, jisse bade bubbles break hote hain aur silky microfoam banta hai.

questions.question: Agar milk foam bahut thick aur dry hai, toh kya galti hui hogi?

options.A: Milk ko zyada der tak aerate kiya gaya
options.B: Milk ko kam aerate kiya gaya
options.C: Milk ko bahut zyada garam kiya gaya
options.D: Milk ko bahut kam garam kiya gaya

questions.explanation: Thick aur dry foam ka matlab hai ki milk ko zyada der tak aerate kiya gaya, jisse bade bubbles ban gaye aur milk ki silky texture nahi bani.

questions.question: Latte art pour karte samay cup ko Barista ki taraf tilt kyon karte hain?

options.A: Taki Barista ko achha angle mile aur surface area badhe
options.B: Taki coffee thandi ho jaye
options.C: Taki milk cup se na gire
options.D: Taki Barista ko zyada effort na lage

questions.explanation: Cup ko tilt karne se surface area badhta hai, jisse milk aur espresso ko mix karne aur design banane ke liye zyada space milta hai.

questions.question: Latte art mein 'etching' kya hai?

options.A: Milk ko pour karne ki ek technique
options.B: Latte art banane ke liye milk surface par tool se design banana

questions.explanation: Etching mein foam ke surface par toothpick ya latte art pen jaise tool se designs banaye jate hain.

questions.question: Agar milk frothing ke baad bahut zyada liquid reh gaya hai aur foam kam hai, toh kya galti hui hogi?

options.A: Steam wand ko bahut der tak deep rakha gaya
options.B: Steam wand ko bahut kam der tak deep rakha gaya
options.C: Milk ko zyada garam kiya gaya
options.D: Milk ko kam garam kiya gaya

questions.explanation: Agar steam wand ko aeration stage mein zyada deep rakha gaya toh air incorporate nahi hogi aur foam kam banega.

questions.question: Latte art mein 'contrast' kyon important hai?

options.B: Taki design clearly dikhe aur attractive lage

questions.explanation: Contrast espresso ke dark brown colour aur white microfoam ke beech hota hai, jo design ko highlight karta hai.

questions.question: Plant-based milk ko froth karna cow milk se alag kyon hota hai?

options.A: Unka temperature point alag hota hai
options.B: Unmein protein aur fat structure alag hota hai, jisse foam banana mushkil ho sakta hai
options.C: Woh zyada jaldi garam ho jate hain

questions.explanation: Plant-based milks mein protein aur fat content cow milk se alag hota hai, jisse unhe frothing ke liye specific techniques aur temperatures ki zaroorat pad sakti hai.

questions.question: Latte art practice ke liye konsa liquid substitute use kar sakte hain?

options.B: Sabun wala pani
options.C: Pani aur dish soap ka mix

questions.explanation: Pani aur dish soap ka mix milk ki tarah foam karta hai aur Barista ko milk waste kiye bina practice karne mein help karta hai.

questions.question: Espresso, steamed milk aur thin layer of foam se bani coffee drink ko kya kehte hain?

options.B: Latte

questions.explanation: Latte mein zyada steamed milk hota hai aur upar ek patli layer microfoam ki hoti hai.

questions.question: Espresso, steamed milk aur thick layer of foam se bani coffee drink ko kya kehte hain?

options.B: Flat White

questions.explanation: Cappuccino mein equal parts espresso, steamed milk aur thick, airy foam hota hai.

questions.question: Espresso aur hot water se bani coffee drink ko kya kehte hain?

options.B: Cappuccino

questions.explanation: Americano espresso shots ko hot water se dilute karke banaya jata hai.

questions.question: Espresso aur chocolate syrup ke saath steamed milk se bani coffee drink ko kya kehte hain?

options.B: Cappuccino

questions.explanation: Mocha ek chocolate-flavoured coffee drink hai, jo espresso, steamed milk aur chocolate syrup se banti hai.

questions.question: French Press brewing method mein coffee ko kaise extract karte hain?

options.B: Dheere-dheere pani drip karke
options.C: Coffee grounds ko garam pani mein steep karke aur phir plunger se press karke

questions.explanation: French Press mein coarse-ground coffee ko garam pani mein steep karte hain, phir mesh plunger se grounds ko neeche push karte hain.

questions.question: V60 ya Chemex jaise 'pour-over' methods mein, konsa factor flavour ko sabse zyada affect karta hai?

options.B: Pouring technique aur water flow rate

questions.explanation: Pour-over methods mein, water flow rate aur pouring technique extraction consistency aur flavour clarity ke liye bahut important hote hain.

questions.question: Cold Brew coffee banane mein kitna time lagta hai minimum?

options.B: 30 minutes

questions.explanation: Cold brew mein coarse ground coffee ko cold water mein 12-24 ghante tak steep karte hain, jisse ek smooth, low-acid concentrate banta hai.

questions.question: Espresso Macchiato mein kya hota hai?

options.B: Espresso 'marked' with a dollop of milk foam

questions.explanation: Macchiato ka matlab hai 'marked' ya 'stained'. Ismein espresso shot ke upar thoda sa milk foam hota hai.

questions.question: Flat White aur Latte mein primary difference kya hai?

options.A: Flat White mein zyada sugar hoti hai
options.B: Flat White mein zyada espresso aur kam, velvety microfoam hota hai, jabki Latte mein zyada milk aur airy foam hota hai
options.C: Flat White cold hota hai, Latte hot
options.D: Flat White mein chocolate hota hai

questions.explanation: Flat White mein ek ya do espresso shots par thin layer of microfoam hoti hai, jo milk ke saath evenly mix hoti hai. Latte mein zyada steamed milk aur thodi thick foam hoti hai.

questions.question: Aeropress brewing method ka kya fayda hai?

options.B: Fast, versatile aur clean cup produce karta hai
options.C: Sirf cold brew bana sakta hai

questions.explanation: Aeropress ek portable device hai jo immersion aur pressure ka use karke fast, clean aur versatile coffee bana sakta hai.

questions.question: Iced Latte banane ke liye kya ingredients chahiye?

options.B: Espresso, cold milk, ice

questions.explanation: Iced Latte mein espresso shots, cold milk aur ice cubes hote hain.

questions.question: Turkish Coffee brewing method ki kya pehchan hai?

options.B: Coffee ko boiling water mein bina filter ke serve karna

questions.explanation: Turkish Coffee mein finely ground coffee ko cezve mein pani ke saath boil kiya jata hai aur bina filter ke serve kiya jata hai, jiske neeche grounds settle ho jate hain.

questions.question: Affogato kya hai?

options.B: Espresso aur whipped cream

questions.explanation: Affogato ek dessert-like drink hai jisme vanilla ice cream ke upar garam espresso shot pour kiya jata hai.

questions.question: Kon sa brewing method paper filter use karta hai jo coffee ke oils ko absorb kar leta hai, jisse ek clean, bright cup milta hai?

options.B: Espresso

questions.explanation: Pour-over methods mein paper filters use hote hain jo sediment aur oils ko retain karte hain, jisse ek clean aur bright cup milta hai.

questions.question: Espresso Con Panna mein kya hota hai?

options.B: Espresso topped with whipped cream

questions.explanation: Espresso Con Panna mein espresso shot ke upar whipped cream ki topping hoti hai.

questions.question: Coffee ke liye ideal water temperature range kya hai, generally, brewing ke liye?
questions.explanation: Coffee ke liye ideal brewing temperature 90-96°C (195-205°F) hota hai, jo flavour compounds ko efficiently extract karta hai bina coffee ko jalaye.

questions.question: Ek Barista ko customer complaints kaise handle karni chahiye?

options.B: Customer se argue karke
options.C: Calmly sunkar, apologize karke aur solution offer karke

questions.explanation: Customer complaints ko calmly sunna, apology dena aur solution offer karna professional customer service ka hissa hai.

questions.question: Food safety ke liye, Barista ko hamesha kya karna chahiye hands ke liye?

options.A: Sirf tab dhona jab gande dikhein
options.B: Regularly aur sahi tareeke se haath dhona

questions.explanation: Food safety aur cross-contamination se bachne ke liye Barista ko regularly aur sahi tareeke se haath dhona zaroori hai.

questions.question: Cross-contamination kya hai?

options.B: Harmful bacteria ko ek surface ya food se dusre par transfer karna

questions.explanation: Cross-contamination food safety ke liye ek serious concern hai, jisse foodborne illnesses ho sakti hain.

questions.question: Inventory management Barista ke liye kyon important hai?

options.A: Taki woh coffee shop ko decorate kar sake
options.B: Taki products ki availability ensure ho aur waste kam ho
options.C: Taki woh zyada salary le sake
options.D: Taki woh manager ko impress kar sake

questions.explanation: Proper inventory management se zaroori items hamesha available rehte hain aur spoilage ya overstocking se hone wala waste kam hota hai.

questions.question: Expired milk ka use kyon nahi karna chahiye?

options.A: Uska colour change ho jata hai
options.B: Uska taste kharab ho jata hai aur woh food poisoning ka reason ban sakta hai
options.C: Woh coffee mein mix nahi hota

questions.explanation: Expired milk mein harmful bacteria grow kar sakte hain, jo health hazards create kar sakte hain.

questions.question: Ek Barista ko upselling aur cross-selling kab karna chahiye?

options.A: Har customer ke saath, force karke
options.B: Jab customer interested lage aur uski needs ke according ho

questions.explanation: Upselling aur cross-selling se revenue badhta hai, lekin yeh customer ki preference aur needs ko dhyan mein rakh kar kiya jana chahiye, na ki force karke.

questions.question: Coffee machines ko daily clean karna kyon zaroori hai?

options.B: Taki unki performance maintain rahe aur coffee ka taste achha rahe, aur hygiene bhi
options.C: Taki woh zyada bijli na khaye

questions.explanation: Daily cleaning se coffee oils aur residues remove hote hain, jo machine ki performance aur coffee ke taste ko affect karte hain. Hygiene bhi maintain rehti hai.

questions.question: FIFO (First In, First Out) principle inventory management mein kyon use karte hain?

options.A: Taki naye products pehle use hon
options.B: Taki purane products pehle use hon aur waste kam ho
options.C: Taki products ko random use kiya ja sake
options.D: Taki products jaldi khatam ho jaye

questions.explanation: FIFO principle yeh ensure karta hai ki jo products pehle aaye hain, unhe pehle use kiya jaye, jisse spoilage aur expiration ka risk kam hota hai.

questions.question: Customer ko allergy information dene ki Barista ki kya responsibility hai?

options.B: Sirf jab customer puche
options.C: Accurate allergy information provide karna aur ingredients ke baare mein aware hona

questions.explanation: Allergy information provide karna Barista ki critical responsibility hai, kyunki yeh customer ki health aur safety se juda hai. Incorrect information ke serious consequences ho sakte hain.

questions.question: Ek Barista ko busy periods mein kaise efficient rehna chahiye?

options.B: Multitasking aur order preparation ko streamline karke
options.C: Customers se baat karna band karke

questions.explanation: Busy periods mein multitasking, efficient workflow aur clear communication se Barista orders ko smoothly handle kar sakta hai.

questions.question: Spills ko turant clean karna kyon zaroori hai?

options.B: Taki slips aur falls se bachav ho aur hygiene maintain ho

questions.explanation: Spills se slip hazards ho sakte hain aur bacteria grow kar sakte hain. Turant cleaning se safety aur hygiene maintain rehti hai.

questions.question: Cash handling karte waqt Barista ko kya dhyan rakhna chahiye?

options.B: Correct change dena aur transaction ko accurately record karna
options.C: Cash ko kahin bhi rakh dena

questions.explanation: Accurate cash handling financial integrity aur customer trust ke liye zaroori hai.

questions.question: Customer feedback lena Barista ke liye kyon important hai?

options.B: Taki Barista apni skills improve kar sake aur customer satisfaction badha sake
options.C: Taki customer ko zyada time lage
options.D: Taki Barista ki galti pakdi ja sake

questions.explanation: Feedback se Barista ko apni strengths aur weaknesses ka pata chalta hai, jisse woh apni service aur product quality ko improve kar sakta hai.

questions.question: Daily closing procedures mein kya shamil hota hai?

options.B: Machines ki deep cleaning, inventory check aur cash reconciliation
options.C: Sirf kal ke liye coffee beans prepare karna

questions.explanation: Daily closing procedures mein machine cleaning, inventory check, cash reconciliation aur general tidying shamil hota hai, jo next day ki smooth operations ke liye zaroori hai.

questions.question: Personal hygiene mein Barista ke liye kya shamil hai?

options.B: Saaf uniform, tied-back hair, clean hands aur minimal jewellery

questions.explanation: Personal hygiene food safety aur professional image ke liye bahut important hai.

questions.question: Stock rotation ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Products ko ek jagah se dusri jagah ghumana
options.B: Naye stock ko purane stock ke aage rakhna
options.C: Purane stock ko pehle use karna (FIFO), naye stock ko peeche rakhna
options.D: Sirf expensive products ko rotate karna

questions.explanation: Stock rotation FIFO principle ka application hai, jisse products ki shelf life maximize hoti hai aur spoilage kam hota hai.

questions.question: Emergency situation (jaise fire ya power cut) mein Barista ko kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Customers aur staff ki safety ensure karna aur emergency protocols follow karna

questions.explanation: Emergency situations mein sabse pehle safety ensure karna aur training ke according emergency protocols ko follow karna Barista ki responsibility hai.
